message:
fix(core): guard PCA against single-sample division by zero

When n=1, (n-1) is 0 which causes division by zero in variance
and eigenvalue calculations. Use Math.max(1, n-1) to guard.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
